overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night, beginning in a narrow teal-lit corridor, moving through elevated walkways with neon city views, and ending in a ground-level market under an overpass. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with vibrant holographic billboards and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: Descending to ground level beneath a highway overpass, entering an informal market area with stalls, white umbrellas, utility poles, and scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, dimly lit alleyway into a sprawling neon metropolis before descending into a crowded ground-level market. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor bathed in teal light, passing a figure against a yellow wall and flickering holographic screens. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the space opens onto an elevated wooden walkway where diners sit under a colorful umbrella, eventually expanding into a wide panoramic view of towering skyscrapers draped in vibrant red and blue neon billboards. The perspective then shifts back to a more industrial scale, moving along rusted railings and corrugated metal structures before ascending a set of stairs. Finally, the camera descends from the heights to the street level beneath a highway overpass, entering an informal market filled with stalls, utility poles, and pedestrians.
